name: Weyerhaeuser Company v. United States Fish and Wildlife Service
question:
1. Does the Endangered Species Act prohibit designation of privately owned land as unoccupied critical habitat that is neither habitat nor essential to species conservation?
  2. Is an agency determination not to exclude an area from critical habitat due to the economic impact of designation subject to judicial review?
description: A case in which the Court held that (1) to be designated a "critical habitat" under the Endangered Species Act, the land must already be habitat for the species; and (2) an agency determination not to exclude an area from critical habitat due to the economic impact of designation is subject to judicial review.
